zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge於1264年出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓時，他的父親Lord Walter de Fauconberge44歲，母親Agnes de Brus36歲。他於大約1285年與Isabel Ros在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年12月31日在英國越可爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁努吉林 安德 貝霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge was born in 1264, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Lord Walter de Fauconberge, was 44 and his mother, Agnes de Brus, was 36. He married Isabel Ros about 1285, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 31 December 1318, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Nunkeeling and Bewholme, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge est né en 1264, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord Walter de Fauconberge, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Brus, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Ros environ 1285, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1318, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Nunkeeling and Bewholme, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge 1264 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Walter de Fauconberge 44 und seine Mutter Agnes de Brus 36. Er hat um 1285 in Yorkshire, England Isabel Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1318 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Nunkeeling and Bewholme, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconbergeが1264年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Lord Walter de Fauconbergeは44歳，母Agnes de Brusは36歳であった。約1285年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでIsabel Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年12月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングヌンケエリング アンド ベウオルメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge(이)가 1264년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Walter de Fauconberge(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Brus(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1285년 영국 요르크실르에서 Isabel Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 12월 31일 영국 요르크실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 누케링 앤드 브화에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge nasceu em 1264, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Walter de Fauconberge, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Brus, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Ros aproximadamente 1285, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1318, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Nunkeeling and Bewholme, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Mary Magdalene and St. Helen Churchy: нункилинг анд бюхолм, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge родился в 1264 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Walter de Fauconberge было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Brus, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Ros около 1285 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 31 декабря 1318 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности нункилинг анд бюхолм, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.
